name: SAIA INC
summary: Overview Saia, Inc., through its wholly-owned subsidiaries, is a transportation company headquartered in Johns Creek, Georgia (Saia, Inc. together with its subsidiaries, the Company or Saia). We provide national less-than-truckload (LTL) services through a single integrated organization.
